name: Som Tam (Spicy Carrot Salad)
recipeIngredient: 2 Bird or other fresh hot chiles, seeded and finely chopped
2 Ripe plum tomatoes, seeded and chopped
1 Head of leaf lettuce, washed, dried and torn into approximately 2-inch pieces
1/2 Small Head green cabbage, cut into thin wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a small heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Add peanuts and dry roast, stirring constantly, until golden, about 2 to 3 minutes.
2. Remove from the skillet, cool slightly, and chop.
3. Combine lime juice, Nam pla, and brown sugar in a bowl, stirring to dissolve the sugar.
4. Place the chopped peanuts in a food processor fitted with a metal blade.
5. With the processor running, add garlic, chiles, and dried shrimp powder (if using). Add the lime-juice mixture and process until smooth.
6. Transfer the dressing to a bowl. Add tomatoes and a handful of carrots. Use a large flat spoon to press and mash the tomatoes and carrots into the dressing.
7. Gradually add the remaining carrots until the salad is fully blended.
8. Line a platter with lettuce, place cabbage wedges around the edge, mound the carrot salad in the center, and serve.
